footer.copy: Explainable pricing analytics for modern e-commerce teams.
home.eyebrow: Pricing strategy and financial management system
home.title: Make effective decisions to grow your business
home.subtitle: PricePilot analyzes the interaction between price, demand, and costs to help you choose the most effective pricing option and efficiently manage your budget and expenses.
home.auth_subtitle: Start the analysis and find the most profitable pricing decisions for your business.
home.auth_step1.title: Enter your data
home.auth_step1.text: Add the product price, costs, and demand data
home.auth_step2.title: Get the analysis
home.auth_step2.text: The system will calculate the optimal price and profit
home.auth_step3.title: Manage the results
home.auth_step3.text: Track your business metrics in the dashboard
analyze.title: Enter your data and get an optimal price for each product
analyze.subtitle: Enter the core product inputs and let PricePilot estimate demand sensitivity, seasonality, returns, and cost allocation from structured business data.
analyze.input_subtitle: Start with the essentials. Open Advanced assumptions only if you need to override the model.
analyze.results_subtitle: Review the recommended price, financial impact, and comparison before you act.
analyze.financial_impact_caption: Projected monthly outcome at the recommended price
analyze.empty_financial_impact: Run an analysis to see the projected financial impact.
analyze.why_recommended_caption: Why this option leads in the current scenario
analyze.empty_recommendation_reason: Run an analysis to see the pricing rationale.
analyze.empty_recommendation: Run an analysis to see how PricePilot built the recommendation.
analyze.strategy_comparison_caption: Compare the recommended option against the clearest pricing alternatives.
analyze.price_optimization_caption: A transparent view of profit across the tested price range
analyze.scenario_comparison_caption: Best recommendation in each market scenario
analyze.empty_scenario_comparison: Run scenario comparison to see how results shift across market conditions.
form_hint.product_name: Use your catalog name or match one of the seeded products.
form_hint.category: Category-level fallbacks and benchmarks depend on this choice.
form_hint.unit_cost: Your landed cost per unit before selling the item.
form_hint.fixed_cost: Shared overhead or fixed spend allocated to this product.
form_hint.base_price: The current or proposed selling price.
form_hint.competitor_price: Optional. Leave blank to use the latest reference from PricePilot data.
form_hint.base_demand: Expected unit demand before scenario adjustments.
form_hint.inventory: Units available for the period you are pricing.
form_hint.elasticity: How strongly demand changes when price moves.
form_hint.return_rate: Expected share of orders that come back.
form_hint.desired_margin: The margin threshold you want the strategy to protect.
form_hint.scenario: Test how market pressure changes the recommendation.
api.error.invalid_payload: Invalid request data. Please refresh the page and try again.
api.error.unexpected_analysis: The analysis could not be completed. Please review the inputs and try again.
api.error.unexpected_scenario_compare: The scenario comparison could not be completed. Please review the inputs and try again.
portfolio.title: Saved Analysis
portfolio.subtitle: See the history of your completed analyses and compare the results.
portfolio.summary.title: Portfolio Summary Metrics
portfolio.summary.subtitle: The main results from your saved analyses in one place.
portfolio.summary.total_products_note: Saved analyses currently tracked in your workspace.
portfolio.summary.total_expected_profit_: Sum of expected profit across your saved analyses.
portfolio.summary.average_profit_improve: Average profit lift from the current price when that comparison is available.
portfolio.summary.top_expected_profit_pr: Saved analysis with the highest expected profit.
portfolio.summary.total_revenue_note: Sum of recommended price x forecast quantity across the portfolio.
portfolio.summary.total_cost_note: Sum of unit cost x forecast quantity across the portfolio.
portfolio.summary.total_profit_note: Total revenue minus total cost across portfolio products.
portfolio.summary.projected_revenue_note: Combined projected revenue from the active recommendations.
portfolio.summary.projected_profit_note: Combined projected profit from the active recommendations.
portfolio.summary.weakest_product_note: Lowest projected profit under the current recommendation.
portfolio.summary.highest_profit_product: Product with the largest projected profit contribution.
portfolio.summary.average_margin_note: Weighted margin across the current portfolio recommendations.
portfolio.summary.empty_note: Run an analysis to start building your workspace.
portfolio.summary.best_product_note: Best balance of projected profit, margin, and confidence.
portfolio.summary.highest_margin_note: Product with the strongest projected profit margin.
portfolio.summary.highest_risk_note: Product that needs the closest pricing review.
portfolio.form.subtitle: Save the core product inputs you want to review repeatedly across the portfolio.
portfolio.list.title: Saved Analyses
portfolio.list.subtitle: Review current price, projected profit, margin, confidence, and data strength for each saved analysis.
portfolio.list.empty: No saved analyses yet. Run an analysis to start your workspace history.
portfolio.messages.deleted: Saved analysis removed from the workspace.
portfolio.messages.not_found: The selected saved analysis could not be found.
portfolio.messages.delete_confirm: Delete this saved analysis from your workspace?
portfolio.comparison.title: Financial Comparison
portfolio.comparison.subtitle: Compare each product's revenue, cost, profit, margin, and contribution share across the portfolio.
portfolio.comparison.empty: Recommendations will appear here once products are added.
portfolio.history.title: Recommendation History
portfolio.history.subtitle: Track how your saved analyses changed over time across price, profit, and confidence.
portfolio.history.empty: No saved analysis history yet. Run an analysis to start tracking changes.
dashboard.title: Review pricing performance and financial impact in one view
dashboard.subtitle: The dashboard summarizes pricing outcomes across your current scope and highlights the scenario signals behind the lead recommendation.
dashboard.module1.label: Data foundation
dashboard.module1.title: Historical sales + competitor signals
dashboard.module1.description: The model learns from sales history, competitor snapshots, market seasonality, and business settings.
dashboard.module2.label: Core outputs
dashboard.module2.title: Demand, revenue, profit, and margin
dashboard.module2.description: Every recommendation shows the commercial tradeoff behind the price, not only the price itself.
dashboard.module3.label: Scenario coverage
dashboard.module3.title: 4 market conditions tested
dashboard.module3.description: Review the strongest price under soft demand, stable demand, strong demand, and campaign periods.
dashboard.module4.label: Decision quality
dashboard.module4.title: Confidence-aware recommendations
dashboard.module4.description: Understand whether assumptions came from product history, category history, or fallback benchmarks.
dashboard.executive_brief_subtitle: A fast read on the current reference analysis.
dashboard.financial_overview_subtitle: A quick summary of projected business impact across the current view.
dashboard.financial_revenue_note: Projected revenue across the current view
dashboard.financial_cost_note: Projected cost including product cost, fees, returns, shipping, and allocated overhead
dashboard.financial_profit_note: Projected profit after all modeled costs
dashboard.financial_margin_note: Weighted margin across the current view
dashboard.performance_overview_subtitle: See which products lead on profit, margin, and confidence.
dashboard.reference_snapshot_subtitle: A reference product view showing how PricePilot summarizes a recommendation.
dashboard.focus_recommendation_subtitle: A closer look at the product currently shaping the summary.
dashboard.scenario_overview_subtitle: See how the focus recommendation performs across different market conditions.
dashboard.assumptions_subtitle: Core model inputs behind the lead recommendation.
about.system.title: About the system
about.system.subtitle: PricePilot is an automated pricing and profit analysis system for structured pricing decisions in e-commerce.
about.system.body1: The system helps users evaluate pricing options, estimate revenue, cost, profit, and margin outcomes, and compare alternatives under the same product and market assumptions.
about.system.body2: It combines product inputs with business data and scenario logic so pricing decisions can be reviewed in a more consistent and transparent way.
about.hero.title: Pricing decisions with clearer margin logic.
about.hero.subtitle: PricePilot helps e-commerce teams price with more context by combining structured business data, explainable forecasts, and scenario-aware recommendations.
about.hero.panel.title: Built for fast pricing reviews with real business logic
about.hero.panel.item1.title: Estimate missing assumptions
about.hero.panel.item1.description: Use product and category history to estimate elasticity, seasonality, return rate, and cost allocation.
about.hero.panel.item2.title: See business impact before rollout
about.hero.panel.item2.description: Review projected demand, revenue, profit, margin, and confidence before the market sees a price change.
about.hero.panel.item3.title: Keep every recommendation explainable
about.hero.panel.item3.description: Show stakeholders where the model used product history, category history, or fallback benchmarks.
about.overview.title: PricePilot turns pricing analysis into a repeatable operating workflow.
about.overview.subtitle: It is designed for e-commerce teams that want smarter pricing decisions without asking users to model every advanced assumption manually.
about.overview.body1: The platform combines synthetic business data, pricing analytics, scenario testing, and explainable recommendations in one product experience.
about.overview.body2: That means teams can move from a few essential inputs to a credible pricing direction faster, with clear visibility into the assumptions behind the answer.
about.overview.card1.title: Make pricing easier to review
about.overview.card1.description: Keep pricing inputs, recommendation logic, and result summaries in a format decision-makers can scan quickly.
about.overview.card2.title: Reduce manual pricing work
about.overview.card2.description: Spend less time entering advanced assumptions and more time reviewing the outcome.
about.overview.card3.title: Act with better margin visibility
about.overview.card3.description: See whether a recommendation improves profitability while staying honest about confidence and fallbacks.
about.capabilities.title: Core capabilities
about.capabilities.subtitle: The system provides four core functions for day-to-day pricing review.
about.capabilities.item1.title: Price evaluation
about.capabilities.item1.description: Assess candidate prices for a product using the same input assumptions and comparison logic.
about.capabilities.item2.title: Profit analysis
about.capabilities.item2.description: Estimate expected revenue, cost, profit, margin, and related financial measures for each option.
about.capabilities.item3.title: Scenario comparison
about.capabilities.item3.description: Compare how recommendations change under different market conditions such as low, normal, high, or promotional demand.
about.capabilities.item4.title: Portfolio view
about.capabilities.item4.description: Review saved products together to compare recommendations, financial performance, and history.
about.capabilities.item5.title: Stress-test market scenarios
about.capabilities.item5.description: Test how softer demand, stronger demand, or promotional periods change the best recommendation.
about.capabilities.item6.title: Keep a portfolio view of pricing work
about.capabilities.item6.description: Save core product inputs, compare recommendations, and export decision history.
about.useful.title: Why it is useful
about.useful.subtitle: The system supports pricing review before a decision is made.
about.useful.body1: PricePilot makes pricing analysis more structured by placing price options, financial estimates, and scenario results in one workflow.
about.useful.body2: This helps users compare alternatives more easily, understand the financial effect of pricing choices in advance, and review the basis of a recommendation before acting.
about.useful.point1: Keeps pricing review consistent across products and scenarios.
about.useful.point2: Makes financial effects easier to interpret before changing a price.
about.useful.point3: Supports clearer discussion of alternatives and expected outcomes.
about.help.title: Built for pricing teams that need answers, not extra complexity
about.help.subtitle: PricePilot is most useful when a team has limited but structured operating data and needs pricing guidance that still feels grounded.
about.help.card.title: What changes with PricePilot
about.help.card.paragraph1: The platform is designed to work with a small set of inputs while drawing on historical and synthetic business data to estimate the rest.
about.help.card.paragraph2: That keeps the workflow practical for early-stage and growing e-commerce teams that want credible pricing analytics without building a full data science stack.
about.help.list.item1: Use essential inputs first and keep advanced overrides optional.
about.help.list.item2: See how much confidence the model has in each assumption.
about.help.list.item3: Compare recommendations across realistic market scenarios.
about.help.list.item4: Export and review pricing decisions over time.
about.help.point1.title: Less manual work
about.help.point1.description: Structured product inputs stay lightweight, so the workflow remains fast for everyday reviews.
about.help.point2.title: Faster scenario review
about.help.point2.description: Historical sales and category data keep the recommendation closer to real pricing logic.
about.help.point3.title: Clearer stakeholder updates
about.help.point3.description: Explainable outputs make it easier to communicate why a recommendation is worth testing.
about.foundation.title: Designed for speed, clarity, and confidence
about.foundation.subtitle: Every page is structured to keep pricing reviews readable on desktop and mobile.
about.foundation.item1.label: Modeling
about.foundation.item1.title: Consistent financial logic
about.foundation.item1.description: Recommendations are evaluated against the same profitability, margin, and risk framework.
about.foundation.item2.label: Workflow
about.foundation.item2.title: Fast product review
about.foundation.item2.description: Inputs, results, and comparisons stay close together so pricing decisions move faster.
about.foundation.item3.label: Visibility
about.foundation.item3.title: Decision-ready reporting
about.foundation.item3.description: Charts, KPI cards, and summaries emphasize what to do next.
about.closing.title: Use pricing data more intelligently, even with a lightweight operating stack.
about.closing.subtitle: Run a product analysis and see how PricePilot estimates the missing assumptions behind a smarter price.
js.highlight_summary: Recommended starting price for the current {scenario} scenario.
js.recommendation_reason_profit: Optimized for maximum profit under the current demand outlook.
js.recommendation_reason_current: Current price already offers the strongest balance of return and risk.
js.recommendation_reason_parity: Aligned close to the market reference to stay competitive without over-discounting.
js.recommendation_position_below: Positioned below competitor reference to support sales volume.
js.recommendation_position_near: Positioned near competitor reference to balance conversion and margin.
js.recommendation_position_above: Positioned above competitor reference to protect margin where demand stays resilient.
js.recommendation_risk_low: Low execution risk under the current {scenario} scenario.
js.recommendation_risk_medium: Moderate execution risk under the current {scenario} scenario.
js.recommendation_risk_high: Higher execution risk, so rollout should be monitored in the current {scenario} scenario.
js.total_cost_note: Includes unit cost, returns, fees, shipping, and fixed cost allocation
js.margin_note_short: Profit as a share of projected revenue
js.why_reason_score: It leads the full strategy set on decision score ({score}).
js.why_reason_financial: It projects {profit} profit, {margin}% margin, and {roi}% ROI.
js.why_reason_comparison: It stays ahead of {next_strategy} by {score_gap} decision points in the current analysis.
js.why_reason_stability: It keeps a cross-scenario stability score of {stability_score}.
js.score_breakdown_note: Score drivers: profit {profit}, margin {margin}, ROI {roi}, risk-adjusted {risk}, stability {stability}.
explanation.title: Recommendation logic
explanation.summary: PricePilot combined baseline demand, seasonality, demand sensitivity, return behavior, competitor context, and cost allocation to recommend this price and quantify its financial effect.
explanation.detail.selection: The leading strategy is {strategy} at {price}. It projects {revenue} in revenue and {profit} in profit.
explanation.detail.metrics: Expected profit margin is {profit_margin}%, contribution margin is {contribution_margin}%, ROI is {roi}%, and execution risk is {risk_level} ({risk_score}/100).
explanation.detail.elasticity: Elasticity is {elasticity}, which means demand is sensitive to price movement. At the recommended price, modeled demand shifts by {elasticity_effect}% versus the blended market reference.
explanation.detail.financial: At this price, PricePilot projects {revenue} in revenue, {total_cost} in total cost, {profit} in profit, and {margin} margin.
explanation.detail.profit_change: Projected profit changes by {change} versus the current price.
explanation.detail.preference: It stays ahead of {next_best_strategy} by {score_gap} decision points, changes expected profit by {profit_gap}, and changes risk by {risk_gap} points versus the next-best option.
explanation.detail.stability: Across all scenarios, the same price averages {mean_profit} profit with a profit standard deviation of {profit_std_dev}. That results in a stability score of {stability_score}.
explanation.detail.break_even.none: Break-even is not reached because the recommended price does not cover variable cost.
explanation.detail.break_even.inside: Break-even is estimated at {break_even_units} units, which stays within the current inventory of {inventory} units.
explanation.detail.break_even.outside: Break-even is estimated at {break_even_units} units, which exceeds the current inventory of {inventory} units and raises execution risk.
explanation.caution.medium: This recommendation carries moderate execution risk and should be monitored after rollout.
explanation.caution.high: This recommendation carries high execution risk and should be rolled out carefully with closer oversight.
analyze.helper_body: PricePilot estimates demand sensitivity, seasonality, and return behavior from historical data. If you want more control, open Advanced assumptions.
analyze.advanced_subtitle: Override model assumptions only when you need to pressure-test a specific view.
analyze.advanced_details_subtitle: Open margin, demand, assumptions, or scenario comparison only when you need deeper detail.
analyze.empty_advanced_metrics: Run an analysis to see advanced recommendation details.
analyze.price_optimization_note: The curve shows how projected profit rises and falls as the tested price changes.
analyze.assumptions_caption: Each estimate shows its source and confidence level
analyze.empty_assumptions: Run an analysis to see estimated assumptions.
bulk_analysis.title: Bulk Product Analysis
bulk_analysis.subtitle: Upload product data in the template format, validate it here, and prepare it for bulk pricing recommendations in the next step.
bulk_analysis.template_description: Download the starter workbook with all required fields and a realistic sample product row.
bulk_analysis.upload_description: Choose your completed .xlsx workbook. PricePilot will check the structure and values before bulk recommendations are connected.
bulk_analysis.upload_required: Choose an .xlsx file before starting bulk analysis.
bulk_analysis.upload_success: File validated successfully. Bulk analysis logic will be connected next.
bulk_analysis.validation_success: File validated successfully. Bulk analysis logic will be connected next.
bulk_analysis.validation_success_count: File validated successfully. {count} valid product {row_word} found. Bulk analysis logic will be connected next.
bulk_analysis.results_summary: {processed} of {total} products were analyzed successfully. {failed} products failed.
bulk_analysis.processing_errors_title: Some products could not be analyzed:
bulk_analysis.results_description: Review the recommended pricing action, expected profit, and current versus optimal price for each product.
form_hint.current_price: The price currently in market or the price you are reviewing.
form_hint.units_sold_30d: Use actual last-30-day units or your best monthly demand estimate.
portfolio.summary.high_confidence_note: Products currently backed by high-confidence assumptions.
recommendation.reason.max_profit: This option produced the highest projected profit across {count} candidate prices.
recommendation.reason.margin_target: Projected margin is {margin} against a target of {target}.
recommendation.reason.market_position: Projected demand is {demand} units with the price positioned {position}.
recommendation.reason.profit_change: Projected profit changes by {change} versus staying at the current price.
recommendation.reason.confidence: Core assumptions range from {baseline} to {elasticity} confidence.
assumption_source.user_input: Taken from the current analysis input.
assumption_source.product_snapshot: Taken from the latest competitor snapshot for this product.
assumption_source.category_snapshot: Estimated from recent competitor snapshots in this category.
assumption_source.current_price_fallback: Fell back to the current price.
assumption_source.business_default: Estimated from the default business allocation rule.
assumption_source.product_share: Estimated from recent product demand share.
assumption_source.category_share: Estimated from average category demand share.
explanation.caution.low: Confidence is low because multiple assumptions relied on category or fallback benchmarks.
explanation.caution.risk: The recommendation is profitable, but it carries meaningful execution risk under the current assumptions.
